title: Pichia pastoris Strain and Growth Condition
author: Igem Dusseldorf
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8hcht2w

steps.title: Grow Pichia pastoris cells on agar...
steps.instruction: Grow Pichia pastoris cells on agar plate containing desired antibiotic ( non-shaking 30°C 72 hours )

steps.instruction: Cultivation

steps.title: Add growth medium (BMGY) to baffled...
steps.instruction: Add growth medium (BMGY) to baffled flasks 3ml-10ml growth medium in 30mL-100mL flasks to ensure sufficient aeration

steps.instruction: Inoculate growth medium with single positive colony

steps.title: Incubate at 30°C at 225rpm overnight 24:00:00 30 °C
steps.instruction: Incubate at 30°C at 225rpm overnight 24:00:00 30 °C

steps.instruction: Gene expression

steps.title: Transfer cultures to sterile 50mL falcon tubes
steps.instruction: Transfer cultures to sterile 50mL falcon tubes

steps.title: Centrifuge and decant supernatant 2000 x g, 5 min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge and decant supernatant 2000 x g, 5 min

steps.title: Add 10mL of sterile BMMY to used baffled flasks
steps.instruction: Add 10mL of sterile BMMY to used baffled flasks. Swirl and transfer to corresponding falcon tube

steps.title: Vortex falcon tube
steps.instruction: Vortex falcon tube

steps.title: Centrifuge falcon tube at 2000 x g, 5 min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge falcon tube at 2000 x g, 5 min

steps.title: Decant supernatant and add 10 mL of fresh BMMY
steps.instruction: Decant supernatant and add 10 mL of fresh BMMY

steps.title: Vortext solution and transfer to original flasks
steps.instruction: Vortext solution and transfer to original flasks

steps.title: Incubate at 225 rpm overnight 24:00:00 30 °C
steps.instruction: Incubate at 225 rpm overnight 24:00:00 30 °C

steps.instruction: Continued expression

steps.title: Add 50 µL sterile 100% methanol to flask
steps.instruction: Add 50 µL sterile 100% methanol to flask

steps.title: Incubate at 30°C at 225 rpm overnight 24:00:00 30 °C
steps.instruction: Incubate at 30°C at 225 rpm overnight 24:00:00 30 °C

steps.title: Cell harvesting
steps.instruction: Cell harvesting

steps.title: Transfer cells to 50 mL falcon...
steps.instruction: Transfer cells to 50 mL falcon tubes from second day and harvest by centrifuging at 2000 x g, 5 min

steps.title: Decant supernatant and resuspend cell wall...
steps.instruction: Decant supernatant and resuspend cell wall containing pellet in 1 mL water.

steps.title: Transfer to pre-weighed 2 mL tube
steps.instruction: Transfer to pre-weighed 2 mL tube

steps.title: Centrifuge, decant water and use cells...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge, decant water and use cells for desired experiments 10000 x g, 2 min

steps.title: For each step where media was...
steps.instruction: For each step where media was added, only 3 mL instead of 10 mL were added.All centrifugation steps were performed at 3.000 x g instead of 2.000 x g and only 20 μL of sterile 100 % methanol were added for methanol induction

steps.title: Grow liquid cultures with starting volume...
steps.instruction: Grow liquid cultures with starting volume of 3 mL in similar procedure From now on: use plastic tubes

steps.title: Store harvested cells at -20°C
steps.instruction: Store harvested cells at -20°C
